title: Bridges in the Sky
synopsis: When Marcus gets separated from his class during a field trip to a village of treehouses, he must navigate rope bridges and make new animal friends while learning how the unique treetop community works.

pages.text: The rope bridge swayed beneath thirty pairs of feet as Marcus's class crossed into the village high in the trees. Marcus gripped the rope rails and felt his stomach flip with each gentle bounce. Below them, the ground looked like a faraway carpet of green and gold.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, walks across a rope bridge with his classmates. The bridge sways high above the forest floor. Treehouses with colorful awnings are visible ahead. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass far below, orange sunset light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Children crossing a rope bridge high in the trees toward treehouses

pages.text: "Stay together, everyone!" called Mrs. Chen from the front of the line. Marcus counted the bridges ahead - one, two, three different paths leading to different treehouses. Each house had windows that glowed like lanterns and balconies where colorful birds perched.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, points upward at multiple rope bridges branching out like a web between treehouses. Bright parrots and toucans sit on the wooden platforms. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass visible below, orange sunset glow, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Multiple rope bridges connecting glowing treehouses with birds perched on balconies

pages.text: The village guide, a woman with kind eyes, pointed to a treehouse with spinning windmills on its roof. "Those windmills power the rope pulleys that lift heavy things up to us," she explained. Marcus watched the colorful blades turn in the breeze, wondering how the wind could become strong enough to pull buckets full of water.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, looks up with wonder at a treehouse topped with spinning windmills in different colors. Rope pulleys dangle from the platforms with buckets attached. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass below, orange sunset light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: A treehouse with colorful spinning windmills and rope pulleys

pages.text: "Can we see how they work?" Marcus asked, but his words were carried away by the wind. The group was already moving toward the next bridge, and Marcus hurried to catch up. His feet moved quickly across the wooden planks, but when he looked up, his classmates were nowhere to be seen.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, stands alone on a rope bridge looking confused and concerned. Empty bridges stretch in different directions around him. Treehouses glow in the distance but no people are visible. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass far below, orange sunset shadows, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus standing alone on a rope bridge with empty pathways around him

pages.text: Marcus chose the bridge that looked most traveled and found himself on a wide wooden platform buzzing with activity. Tree-dwellers sold fruits from woven baskets while monkeys chattered in the branches overhead. The smell of roasted nuts made his stomach rumble, but he had to find his class.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, walks through a busy treehouse market platform. Vendors sell colorful fruits from baskets while playful monkeys swing in the branches above. Smoke rises from a nut-roasting stand. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass visible below, orange sunset market glow, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus in a busy treehouse market with vendors and monkeys

pages.text: "Excuse me," Marcus said to a friendly vendor. "Did you see a group of children come through here?" The woman shook her head and pointed to three different bridges. "Many children visit today. Try the Learning Platform - that way has the most questions."

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, talks to a kind vendor woman who points toward different rope bridges. Her fruit stand is full of mangoes and bananas. A curious parrot perches nearby listening to their conversation. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass below, orange sunset light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus talking to a fruit vendor who points toward different bridges

pages.text: Before leaving, Marcus watched how the vendor's scale worked. She placed fruit on one side and small stones on the other until they balanced perfectly. "The stones tell me how much the fruit weighs," she explained when she noticed him staring. "Each stone is exactly the same weight."

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, examines a balance scale closely as the vendor demonstrates. Mangoes sit on one side, smooth stones on the other, perfectly balanced. His expression shows fascination with how it works. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass background, orange sunset lighting, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus watching a vendor demonstrate a balance scale with fruit and stones

pages.text: Marcus thanked the vendor and headed toward the Learning Platform, but stopped when he heard familiar giggling. He spun around, searching the crowd, but saw only strangers and the monkeys who seemed to find everything hilarious. His heart began to beat faster.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, looks around anxiously in the crowded market. Laughing monkeys swing overhead while people walk past him in different directions. His posture shows growing worry as he searches for familiar faces. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass far below, orange sunset shadows, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus looking worried as he searches through the crowded market platform

pages.text: The Learning Platform was quieter than the market, with demonstration areas where village teachers showed visitors how things worked. Marcus found a group gathered around a woman who was explaining how tree roots cleaned their drinking water, but his classmates weren't among them.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, approaches a small group watching a teacher demonstrate a water filtration system using sand, rocks, and tree roots in clear containers. The setup shows dirty water becoming clean. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass visible below, orange sunset classroom light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus watching a teacher demonstrate water filtration with roots and sand

pages.text: A young squirrel scampered up to Marcus and chittered softly. It seemed to be trying to tell him something, pointing its tiny paw toward a narrow bridge that led to a smaller platform. Marcus had never seen a squirrel act like this before - almost like it understood he was lost.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, kneels down as a friendly gray squirrel points with its paw toward a thin rope bridge. The squirrel's eyes are bright and intelligent, and Marcus looks surprised but hopeful. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass background, orange sunset glow, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus kneeling as a helpful squirrel points toward a narrow bridge

pages.text: "Do you know where my class went?" Marcus whispered to the squirrel. The little animal chittered again and started across the narrow bridge, looking back as if to say 'follow me.' Marcus had never trusted a squirrel before, but something about this one felt different - like it really wanted to help.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, follows the gray squirrel across a narrow rope bridge. The squirrel looks back encouragingly while Marcus holds the rope rails carefully. Smaller treehouses are visible ahead. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass far below, orange sunset adventure light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus following a helpful squirrel across a narrow rope bridge

pages.text: The narrow bridge swayed more than the others, and Marcus moved slowly, one step at a time. He noticed how the ropes were woven together in a special pattern that made them stronger. Even though he was scared, he couldn't help wondering who had figured out this design and why it worked so well.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, carefully examines the woven rope pattern of the bridge as he crosses. His expression shows both concentration and curiosity despite his nervousness. The squirrel waits patiently ahead. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass below, orange sunset detailed light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus studying the woven rope pattern while crossing the narrow bridge

pages.text: The squirrel led Marcus to a small platform with telescopes pointing in all directions. From here, he could see the entire village spread out like a map below him. He put his eye to one telescope and slowly turned it, searching each platform for his classmates.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, looks through a telescope on an observation platform while the helpful squirrel sits nearby. Multiple treehouses and rope bridges are visible in the background like a vast network. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass far below, orange sunset observation light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus using a telescope to search for his classmates from an observation deck

pages.text: "There!" Marcus shouted as he spotted a group of children gathered around the windmill treehouse he'd seen earlier. The telescope made them look close enough to touch, even though they were far away. He could even see Mrs. Chen pointing up at the spinning blades and explaining something with her hands.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, points excitedly while looking through the telescope. In the distance, visible through another part of the image, his classmates and teacher gather around the windmill treehouse. The squirrel seems pleased with the discovery. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass background, orange sunset triumphant light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus pointing excitedly after spotting his classmates through the telescope

pages.text: The squirrel chittered happily and pointed to a bridge that led directly toward the windmill platform. Marcus had learned something important: when you get lost, sometimes going up high helps you see where you need to go. He patted the squirrel's head gently.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, gently pats the squirrel while both look toward a rope bridge leading to the windmill treehouse. Marcus appears relieved and grateful. The observation deck shows other telescopes and a clear view of the village map below. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass vista, orange sunset grateful light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus patting the helpful squirrel while looking toward the bridge to rejoin his class

pages.text: When Marcus reached his classmates, Mrs. Chen hugged him tight. "We were so worried!" she said. Marcus told them about the kind vendor's scale, the water-cleaning roots, and especially about his squirrel friend who'd helped him think like an explorer. The squirrel chattered proudly from a nearby branch, and Marcus waved goodbye as the class headed home across the swaying bridges.

illustration.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, is hugged by Mrs. Chen while his classmates gather around listening to his adventure story. The helpful squirrel sits on a tree branch nearby, and the windmill treehouse spins gently in the background. Everyone looks happy and relieved. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass below, orange sunset reunion light, bold confident strokes.
illustration.alt: Marcus reunited with his teacher and classmates, waving goodbye to the helpful squirrel

coverPrompt.description: Marcus, a boy with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, and warm brown eyes, stands on a rope bridge high in the trees, looking up at treehouses connected by swaying bridges. Colorful parrots and monkeys peek out from the wooden platforms. Gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly technique, golden grass visible far below, orange sunset light filtering through leaves, bold confident strokes.
coverPrompt.alt: A boy on a rope bridge looking at treehouses connected in the sky

questions.question: How did Marcus get separated from his class?
choices: He stopped to look at the windmills and fell behind
He took the wrong bridge while trying to catch up
He got distracted by the monkeys
questions.explanation: Marcus hurried to catch up with his class but took the wrong bridge and ended up lost.

questions.question: What did the vendor use to weigh fruit?
questions.explanation: The vendor used stones that were all the same weight on a balance scale to measure the fruit.

questions.question: Who helped Marcus find his way?
questions.explanation: A helpful squirrel led Marcus to the observation deck where he could see his classmates.

questions.question: How did Marcus finally spot his classmates?
choices: He heard them calling his name
He used a telescope from the observation deck
questions.explanation: Marcus used a telescope from the high observation deck to search the village and spot his class.

questions.question: What did Marcus learn about solving problems?
choices: Going to a high place can help you see where to go
Follow the biggest group of people
questions.explanation: Marcus learned that getting a higher perspective helped him see where he needed to go to find his class.
